title: aeonium arboreum subsp. holochrysum
intro: Aeonium arboreum subsp. holochrysum, also known as the tree houseleek or golden tree houseleek, is a succulent plant species belonging to the family Crassulaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Aeonium arboreum subsp. holochrysum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Aeonium arboreum subsp. holochrysum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts for medicinal use.
